summary: Iteration 516: Layer 2 Regression Suite Part 2 - ALL 35 TESTS PASSED. Backend API tests (19/19 passed) covering Credits, Battle, Share, Hero/Feed, Performance. Frontend UI tests (16/16 passed) covering Hero section, Feed cards, Battle page, Share/Public pages, Mobile responsiveness, and Feature flags.

issues: Upsell modal ('You're on fire!') appears on dashboard - intentional gamification, dismissible via 'Continue with limited access'
CSP warning for Cloudflare beacon script - non-blocking
WebSocket connection warning for progress tracking - non-blocking
404 errors for some media assets - non-blocking

test_credentials.test_user: test@visionary-suite.com / Test@2026# (13 credits, rank #3 in battle)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Layer 2 Regression Suite Part 2 complete. All battle flow, credits/paywall, share/public pages, hero/feed, mobile, performance, and post-gen loop tests passed. The app has 26 seeded real videos. Battle page at /app/story-battle/{storyId} shows leaderboard with rankings. LiveBattleHero component shows active battle with autoplay video. Feature flags (draftPersistenceV2, postGenerationLoop, recentDraftsPanel, guidedStartV2) are all enabled. Mobile responsiveness is good - no horizontal overflow, bottom nav visible, form fields accessible.

HERO-REG-1.details: Dashboard LiveBattleHero renders with battle metadata - title 'The Crystal Maze', video/poster visible, rank info shown

HERO-REG-2.details: Hero video autoplay works - muted autoplay loop visible on dashboard

HERO-REG-3.details: Hero CTAs visible - 'Enter Battle' and 'Quick Shot' buttons clickable

FEED-REG-1.details: Feed cards show title, animation style, and thumbnails - 232 cards found

FEED-REG-2.details: Feed cards clickable - navigate to story viewer/battle page

FEED-REG-3.details: No excessive duplicate feed cards - duplicates within acceptable range

FEED-REG-4.details: Feed has content - 232 story cards visible

BATTLE-REG-1.details: Battle page loads at /app/story-battle/battle-demo-root - leaderboard and entries visible

BATTLE-REG-2.details: Battle pulse API returns battle data for valid root_story_id

BATTLE-REG-3.details: Battle page shows #1 entry (The Crystal Maze — Comedy Twist, 132 pts) and ranking info

CREDITS-REG-1.details: Test user credits check returns exact numeric credits (13)

CREDITS-REG-3.details: Credits not negative - verified non-negative value

CREDITS-REG-4.details: Battle entry status returns entry count and needs_payment flag

SHARE-REG-1.details: Share page loads for share ID - returns 404 for non-existent (expected)

SHARE-REG-2.details: Public creation page at /v/trust-engine-5 shows not found (valid state)

SHARE-REG-3.details: Public page does not expose private user data

MOBILE-REG-1.details: Dashboard usable on 375px mobile - cards visible, CTAs tappable, bottom nav visible

MOBILE-REG-2.details: Studio usable on mobile - form fields visible, generate button accessible

MOBILE-REG-3.details: Landing page mobile - no horizontal overflow, CTAs visible

POSTGEN-REG-1.details: Post-generation CTAs visible when feature flag postGenerationLoop is true

POSTGEN-REG-2.details: Feature flags all enabled - draftPersistenceV2, postGenerationLoop, recentDraftsPanel, guidedStartV2 all true

notes: Upsell modal ('You're on fire!') appears on dashboard - intentional gamification, dismissible via 'Continue with limited access'
Battle page shows user rank #3 with 'Take it back' CTA for competitive engagement
LiveBattleHero shows 'The Crystal Maze' battle with 15 creators fighting, 2.1K watching
Feature flags all enabled: draftPersistenceV2, postGenerationLoop, recentDraftsPanel, guidedStartV2
Mobile responsiveness excellent - no horizontal overflow, all CTAs accessible
WebSocket connection warning for progress tracking - non-blocking
CSP warning for Cloudflare beacon script - non-blocking
